basic_details.job_title: NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Jamshedpur (NIT Jamshedpur) has published the Temporary Faculty Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. NITJSR/ESS/CD/2026/1186. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Temporary Faculty positions on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a Master's Degree or Doctorate in the relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or CGPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's levels are eligible to apply through Email on or before 20 July 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and applicat

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree or Doctorate in relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's level.
qualification.details: Master Degree or Doctorate in a relevant discipline. Must have secured first class (60% marks or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's level.

salary_details.details: Rs.70000/- per month (Consolidated) for Ph.D. Rs.50000/- per month (Consolidated) without Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Jamshedpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the NIT Jamshedpur Temporary Faculty positions is 20-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Temporary Faculty post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies available for the Temporary Faculty post at NIT Jamshedpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Temporary Faculty role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master Degree or Doctorate in a relevant discipline with a first-class mark (60% or GPA 6.5/10) at both Bachelor's and Master's levels.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 70,000/- per month for Ph.D. holders and Rs. 50,000/- per month for those without a Ph.D., on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Temporary Faculty positions is scheduled for 22-07-2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the NIT Jamshedpur recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of NIT Jamshedpur?
faq.answer: The official website of NIT Jamshedpur is WWW.NITJSR.AC.IN.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is NITJSR/ESS/CD/2026/1186.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is NIT Jamshedpur located in?
faq.answer: NIT Jamshedpur is located in Jamshedpur, Jharkhand.
